steps.title: Enclose the interrupting phrase
steps.content: The phrase "in the process" interrupts between the linked actions "alter the particles" and "dismantle any information." Because it is parenthetical, it needs matching punctuation on both sides.

steps.title: Use two matching commas
steps.content: A lacks the opening comma before the interruption. C uses a dash without a matching opening dash or comma pair. D opens the interruption with a comma but fails to close it before the sentence continues. The form with both commas is correct. The answer is B.
